# API Path Helpers

API Path Helpers copy-first generated block.

Generated from ../agent-native/packages/core/src/client/api-path.ts (@agent-native/core@0.79.19).

## Copy instructions

Run `pnpm --dir catalog/blocks/api-path test` and `pnpm --dir catalog/blocks/api-path typecheck`, then copy the files under `src/` into your app.

## Caveats

- The copy-first projection removes the embed-auth side-effect import; if your host relies on embed auth interception, wire it explicitly before fetch calls.

## When not to use

- Do not use as a router; it only builds base-path-aware URLs.
